title: Viral illness
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports uncomplicated common-cold respiratory symptom context but not a broad viral diagnosis.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

red_flags.text: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

red_flags.text: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Supports breathing, chest, neurologic, swallowing, rash, and dehydration concerns as prompts only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists respiratory, swallowing, neurologic, rash, and pediatric breathing concerns that require assessment or escalation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

source_limitations: The source does not verify a broad viral-syndrome diagnosis, influenza, COVID-19, systemic infection, or every listed symptom.
Tests, supportive care, hydration, rest, return precautions, fixed follow-up, treatment, and medicines remain unsupported.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
